name: Gliclazide And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets
about: Gliclazide And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets are a combination medication used to treat type 2 diabetes. This medication belongs to the class of sulfonylureas and biguanides. The tablets come in solid form and are taken orally as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional. The medicine is manufactured in India and is available in the form of tablets. These tablets should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is the use of Gliclazide And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets?
faq.a: This medication is used to treat type 2 diabetes.

faq.q: What is the drug type of Gliclazide And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets?
faq.a: The drug type of this medication is general medicines.

faq.q: What is the dosage form of Gliclazide And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets?
faq.a: The dosage form of this medication is solid tablets.

faq.q: Where is Gliclazide And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets manufactured?
faq.a: This medication is manufactured in India.

faq.q: How should Gliclazide And Metformin Hydrochloride Tablets be stored?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry place.
